nasb.text: He who justifies the wicked and he who condemns the righteous, Both of them alike are an abomination to the Lord.

esv.text: He who justifies the wicked and he who condemns the righteous are both alike an abomination to the Lord.

cnv.text: 宣判惡人為義，裁定義人有罪， 二者都是耶和華所厭惡的。

ccb.text: 放过罪人、冤枉义人， 都为耶和华所憎恶。

csbs.text: 称恶人为义的、判义人有罪的， 两者都是耶和华所憎恶的。
